name: stitch-orchestrator
description: Stitch-first orchestration plugin scaffold for prompt-to-frontend workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Turns a prompt into a Stitch-driven frontend workflow.
interface.longDescription: Scaffold entrypoint for a Stitch-first plugin that validates run inputs, selects a framework target, and routes into the future orchestration pipeline.
defaultPrompt: Turn this product brief into a staged Stitch workflow.
Set up a React + Vite app from an approved Stitch design.
Review the design flow before generating the frontend.
